implementation_summary.summary: CP00-882 closes the remaining RP29 Commercial Readiness P04 UI fixture, build, Hermes, Claude, handoff, snapshot, and no-unauthorized-count-leak rows while opening the P05 fixture/golden-case bridge through RP29.P05.M02.S17. It adds descriptor-only synthetic tenant and matter fixtures plus primary, secondary, review-required, denied, cross-tenant, missing-context, audit-hint, security-trimming, AI retrieval or analytics, fixture manifest, golden test, failure test, and Hermes fixture evidence coverage without opening runtime UI behavior, fixture execution, permission decisions, audit writes, runtime receipts, unauthorized counts, real client data, credentials, or secrets.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-882 RP29.P04.M04.S16-RP29.P05.M02.S17 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
